title: Algebraic Family Clusters vs Operadic Skeleton Partition

hierarchy.explanation: Neither partition nests inside the other. Recurrence algebra and formula syntax detect genuinely different mathematical structure -- they are complementary classification axes.

cross_boundary_families.interpretation: Triple-domain crossing: the recurrence x^2 +x -2 generates sequences appearing in classical_analysis, analytic_number_theory, combinatorics, other. The algebra is more fundamental than any single domain -- different mathematical communities have independently discovered sequences obeying this recurrence.
Dual-domain bridge: x^4 +x^3 -x^2 -1 connects classical_analysis and combinatorics. Same algebraic skeleton, different mathematical interpretations.

Triple-domain crossing: the recurrence x^2 -x -1 generates sequences appearing in classical_analysis, analytic_number_theory, combinatorics. The algebra is more fundamental than any single domain -- different mathematical communities have independently discovered sequences obeying this recurrence.
